case_title: RASMUSSEN, JESPER et al VS WILSON, YUKA

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY RASMUSSEN, JESPER NAGHSHINEH, ROYA ARNELLE, HASTIE, MCGEE, ET AL AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON, YUKA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-20-1997 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON, YUKA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RASMUSSEN, JESPER NAGHSHINEH, ROYA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILSON, YUKA $4,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $143.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,643.00, JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF RASMUSSEN IN THE SUM OF $2000 JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF NAGHSHINEH IN SUM OF $2500 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO DEFT SENT TO NEW ADDRESS PER CORRESPONDECE FROM PLFT.
MAILED COPY OF JUDGMENT TO DEFENDANT'S NEW ADRESS.
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT WILSON, YUKA
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 25298, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RASMUSSEN, JESPER NAGHSHINEH, ROYA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILSON, YUKA $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $187.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,187.50, DEFEND. TO PAY PLTFF. RASMUSSEN $500.00 AND PLTFF NAGHSHINEH $500.00 SCA 25298 2-9-98. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON, YUKA
